RUNWILD
BY REMY

This Year In Numbers

1,240 miles logged
6 races finished
84 sunrise runs
3 pairs of shoes retired

These aren't just numbers on a watch. They're every early alarm, every aching calf, and every morning I chose to lace up anyway.

we ran it
02 / 05
RUNWILD
BY REMY

My Biggest Milestone

This year I finally:
• Ran my first full marathon
• Broke a four-hour finish

For years this was a maybe-someday. Crossing that line turned it into a did-that — small, stubborn steps got me the whole way home.

so proud
03 / 05
RUNWILD
BY REMY

The Run That Stole My Heart

Where: Redwood Ridge Trail
Distance: 14 misty miles

No watch, no pace goal — just fog in the pines and the sound of my own breathing. It reminded me why I started chasing sunrises at all.

pure joy
